project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, SWR data fetching, Framer Motion animations
build_system: npm with Next.js build (Turbopack). Prisma ORM requires `npx prisma generate` before build.
test_framework: Vitest with vite-tsconfig-paths. Tests in src/**/__tests__/ and src/lib/*.test.ts. 19 pre-existing test failures in backend tests (not UI-related).
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/movistan && npx prisma generate && npx next build
verification_instructions: 1. Run prisma generate. 2. Run next build - must pass. 3. Run vitest run - pre-existing failures in backend tests are acceptable, no NEW test failures should be introduced. 4. Verify landing page and settings page remain unchanged.
snapshot_or_generated_files: src/generated/prisma/ - generated by `npx prisma generate` from prisma/schema.prisma. Not checked in.
environment_constraints: Open internet. Node.js available. No Docker needed for build validation.
contribution_requirements: Keep landing page (src/app/page.tsx, src/components/landing/) and settings page (src/app/settings/, src/components/settings/) unchanged. Keep backend API routes unchanged. Keep dark/violet brand system.
key_patterns: Components use CSS variables (--brand-violet, --surface, --text-primary, etc.) from globals.css. Lucide icons. Framer Motion for animations. SWR for data fetching with hooks (useSession, useEventStream). Session state is fetched via /api/sessions/{id} and returns SessionState type. Domain types in src/types/domain.ts. UI components in src/components/ui/. Workspace components in src/components/workspace/.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js app router pages. src/components/workspace/ - main workspace UI components. src/components/session/ - session list/form components. src/components/ui/ - shared UI primitives. src/hooks/ - SWR-based data hooks. src/types/ - TypeScript domain types. src/lib/ - backend logic and DB access.
